channel.title: Android on Mike Wilcome’s Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Mike Wilcome’s Blog

item.title: Steering Through Uncertainty: A Leadership Perspective on the Jetpack Compose Navigation 'Navigation 3' Rumor
item.description: A Principal Engineer reflects on validating rumors like the 'Navigation 3' speculation around Jetpack Compose Navigation and the importance of disciplined decision-making in software leadership.
